rules.text: Never overwrite locked UI design without explicit approval and re-seal.
Never remove or replace the canonical project logo with placeholders.
Never duplicate page sections or headings on a single route.
Never change protected pricing layout or tier order without approval.
Never push without build validation passing.
Never declare production complete without live verification.
Never use mockup-only mode for production fixes.
Never mix old and new code fragments in the same protected surface.
Never apply one project's branding or business rules to another project.
Never damage a previous confirmed setup without checkpoint rollback.
